ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states_provinces" (
  "state_province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or province */,
  "state_province_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or province */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state or province */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the state or province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the country */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the continent */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level category */,
  "income_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level category */,
  "min_income" REAL /* Minimum income for the category */,
  "max_income" REAL /* Maximum income for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion response */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was made */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, purchase) */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segmentations" (
  "segmentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segmentation */,
  "segmentation_name" TEXT /* Name of the segmentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segmentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segmentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who interacted with the company */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, chat) */,
  "interaction_result" TEXT /* Result of the interaction (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)
